name: Tomato-Zucchini Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the chili powder, parsley flakes, garlic powder, onion powder, salt and pepper.
2. Place half of the zucchini in a lightly greased 6-cup casserole dish or layer with half of the tomatoes.
3. Sprinkle with half of the seasoning mixture.
4. Repeat the layers with remaining ingredients.
5. Combine bread crumbs, oil and parsley flakes; sprinkle over vegetables.
6. Bake, uncovered, in a preheated oven at 375°F until vegetables are tender, about 40 minutes.
